song.title: Always Forever
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C B C
song.lyrics:
[v1] You are the hand who catches my fall You are the friend that answers my call You are my day, You are my night You are my love and all of my life
[c] You are the love I need You are the air I breathe You are my love, my life Always forever I would lay down my life Just to be by Your side You are my love, my life Always forever Always forever
[v2] You are the grace That covers my sin You're everything, The beginning and end You have my soul, My heart and my mind You are my love and all of my life
[b] Hallelujah, Hallelujah, Hallelujah, forever
